rendering_rule: bar: stream vs quarterly_mape and annual_mape; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.

bar: component_short vs weight_pct; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
line: stress_bucket vs mape, Finalist scenario; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
bar: lag vs acf_value; choose residual_scope explicitly; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
scatter: pred vs error_pct in native stream units; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
matrix: diagnostic_test vs pass_status; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
box: abs_error_pct by stream_label and horizon_bucket; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
dumbbell: Finalist vs Schiff quarterly/annual MAPE; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
bar: full_sample_qtr_gain_pp and full_sample_annual_gain_pp; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
line: horizon vs mape, scenario Finalist vs Schiff; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
table: full-sample gains, paired win rate, recommendation; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
bar: Schiff vs Finalist Qtr/Annual MAPE; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
line: horizon vs mape, scenario Finalist vs Schiff; default scorecard uses schiff_paper_horizon_mean unless user toggles operational.
